transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my electrical panel has no power and it's getting bad! This is Gary Olsen at 314 Birch Lane. Dispatcher: Okay Gary, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 314 Birch Lane right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: electrical panel has no power
